title: Advice Surgeries | Martin Vickers
meta_description: Martin Vickers holds regular advice surgeries across the constituency. To book an appointment, please email or call 01472 603 554Surgeries are as follows:Cleethorpes Library, Alexandra Road CleethorpesBarton Library, Holydyke Barton Upon HumberWaltham Library, High Street WalthamImmingham Civic Centre, Pelham Road, Immingham
headings: h3: Martin Vickers Conservative candidate for Brigg and Immingham
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries | Martin Vickers Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Martin News My Speeches Advice Surgeries Campaigns Contact Advice Surgeries Tweet Martin Vickers holds regular advice surgeries across the constituency. To book an appointment, please email [email protected] or call 01469 572777 Surgeries are held at the following locations: Brigg, Barton, Waltham and Immingham. NB: Surgeries are by appointment only and may be subject to change at short notice.
